item.title: [PAR][Network] - Backbone maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Sep 9, 19:00 UTC  -  Sep 10, 04:00 UTC

Jul 17, 15:20 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 09/09/2026 19:00 UTC
End time : 10/09/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers may experience latency during maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, our teams will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

Service impact : Customers may experience latency during maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, our teams will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS8][Infrastructure] - Rack BHS0815B02B maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 31, 10:00 - 22:00 UTC

Jul 20, 12:53 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 31/08/2026 10:00 UTC
End time : 31/08/2026 22:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, the servers in the specified rack will be gracefully shut down to allow the maintenance activities to be performed safely. As a result, the services hosted on these servers will be unavailable before being restored once the maintenance is complete.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Infrastructure] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 24, 06:00 UTC  -  Aug 28, 14:00 UTC

Jul 16, 13:48 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure in DC.

Start time : 24/08/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 28/08/2026 14:00 UTC

List of concerned racks :
R803R18
R803R21
R804L13
R804L14
R804L23
R804L24
R805R13
R805R15
R805R24
R806L16
R806R13
R806R14
R807L18
R807R15
R807R16
R807R17
R807R18
R808R16
R822R17
R822R18
R822R19
R822R20
R823L20
R823R22
R831A17
R832B10

Service impact : Customers could experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS8][Infrastructure] - Rack BHS0817A01A maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 21, 10:30 - 16:30 UTC

Jul 20, 14:53 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 21/08/2026 10:30 UTC
End time : 21/08/2026 16:30 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
